narrative:
Precinct Laurel Cliff (precinct in Meigs County) has 404 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.7 percentage points.
